skills.name: novel-orchestrator

skills.description: Publish markdown and return share links using curl. Support markdown with mermaid diagrams such as component diagrams, flowcharts, and sequence diagrams. Also supports KaTex and code blocks. AutEng will return a shareable link to the published rendered document. Use cases include Software Architecture diagrams and documentation, Maths and Physics derivations and Systems documentation.
skills.description_zh: 使用 curl 发布 Markdown 并返回分享链接。支持包含 Mermaid 图表（如组件图、流程图和序列图）、KaTex 和代码块。AutEng 将返回已发布渲染文档的分享链接。适用于软件架构图、文档、数理推导及系统文档编写。
skills.name: Markdown Publish & Share
